chunks.text: Technical Reports - Nika Haghtalab. Covert Malicious Finetuning: Challenges in Safeguarding LLM Adaption (EECS-2024-216). Danny Halawi, Alexander Wei, Eric Wallace, Tony Wang, Nika Haghtalab and Jacob Steinhardt.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report?
chunks.answer: Covert Malicious Finetuning: Challenges in Safeguarding LLM Adaption

chunks.text: The report is authored by Danny Halawi, Alexander Wei, Eric Wallace, Tony Wang, Nika Haghtalab, and Jacob Steinhardt. It discusses challenges in safeguarding large language model adaptation from malicious finetuning attempts.
chunks.question: Who are the authors of the report?
chunks.answer: Danny Halawi, Alexander Wei, Eric Wallace, Tony Wang, Nika Haghtalab, Jacob Steinhardt
